---
title: "Hardware & Models"
---

# PolliCam Hardware

This section outlines the physical and mechanical integration of the PolliCam field hardware.

## 3D Models

*(Placeholder for an image of the final 3D box model)*
![PolliCam 3D Render Placeholder](images/placeholder_render.png)

### Files to Download

You can download the STL files required for 3D printing the camera enclosure and internal mounts here:

* [Camera Box (Base)](../box_blender_files/box_base.stl) - *Please ensure this link points to your actual file.*
* [Pi Zero 2 W Cradle](../box_blender_files/pi_cradle.stl)
* [M12 Vent Mount](../box_blender_files/vent_mount.stl)

## Version Tracking

| Version | Date       | Changes                                                                 | Author |
|---------|------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------|
| v1.0    | 2026-06-18 | Initial box layout, resolved boolean errors for M12 vent and Pi cradle. | Kuba   |
| v0.9    | 2026-06-10 | Prototypes for internal mounting.                                       | Kuba   |
